title: WTF talking about being “the broker for AI”
author: Serious_Truck283
selftext:
So $WTF popped up on my radar again, yeah, the ticker is funny, but the angle they’re pushing is actually kinda interesting. They’re not just trying to be another online broker, they want to position as *the brokerage for AI*.

Basically, the idea is that down the line, AIs will be running funds, trading portfolios, doing executions… and someone’s gotta build the rails to serve them. WTF is saying: why not us?

Could be total buzzword marketing, could be ahead of the curve. Hard to tell right now, but if AI really keeps eating into finance, this isn’t the worst lane to be in.

Anyone think this could be a legit niche?
